posts.author: ecatelo (Emilee Catelo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

How come when we add a new question on a form, the title of the question does not populate in the main table? It only shows the column type. Although this seems like a bug, I confirmed with support chatbot that this is not a current feature and the workaround is to “manually edit the column name on your board to match the question title from your form”.

What are you trying to achieve

Would be great if it synced when you build questions directly from the form view. It gets really confusing to reconcile the column names vs. the actual questions.
